sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_col(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT user_id FROM $wpdb->usermeta WHERE meta_key IN (%s, %s) LIMIT 20",
				$this->user_options->get_meta_key( Verification_File::OPTION ),
				$this->user_options->get_meta_key( Verification_Meta::OPTION )
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_col(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT DISTINCT user_id
				FROM $wpdb->usermeta
				WHERE meta_key IN (%s, %s)
				LIMIT 100 -- Arbitrary limit to avoid unbounded user iteration.",
				$this->user_options->get_meta_key( Dismissed_Items::OPTION ),
				$this->user_options->get_meta_key( Dismissed_Prompts::OPTION ),
			)
		)

wp_send_json( array( 'error' => __( 'You do not have permission to activate plugins on this site.', 'google-site-kit' ) ) )
printf( "<!-- %s -->\n", esc_html__( 'Google tag (gtag.js) consent mode dataLayer added by Site Kit', 'google-site-kit' ) )
printf( "<!-- %s -->\n", esc_html__( 'End Google tag (gtag.js) consent mode dataLayer added by Site Kit', 'google-site-kit' ) )
printf( "\n<!-- %s -->\n", esc_html__( 'Google tag gateway for advertisers snippet added by Site Kit', 'google-site-kit' ) )

$wpdb->get_col(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT user_id FROM $wpdb->usermeta WHERE meta_key IN (%s, %s) LIMIT 20",
				$this->user_options->get_meta_key( Verification_File::OPTION ),
				$this->user_options->get_meta_key( Verification_Meta::OPTION )
			)
		)

$wpdb->query(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				/* phpcs:disable WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared */
				"
				DELETE FROM {$table_name}
				 WHERE {$column_name} LIKE %s
				    OR {$column_name} LIKE %s
				    OR {$column_name} LIKE %s
				    OR {$column_name} = %s
				", /* phpcs:enable WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared */
				static::KEY_PATTERN,
				$transient_prefix . static::KEY_PATTERN,
				$transient_prefix . 'timeout_' . static::KEY_PATTERN,
				'googlesitekit-active-modules'
			)
		)
wp_die( esc_html__( 'You don’t have permissions to set up Site Kit.', 'google-site-kit' ), 403 )
printf( "\n<!-- %s -->\n", esc_html__( 'Google AdSense AMP snippet added by Site Kit', 'google-site-kit' ) )
printf( "\n<!-- %s -->\n", esc_html__( 'End Google AdSense AMP snippet added by Site Kit', 'google-site-kit' ) )
printf( "\n<!-- %s -->\n", esc_html__( 'Google AdSense AMP snippet added by Site Kit', 'google-site-kit' ) )

printf( "\n<!-- %s -->\n", esc_html__( 'End Google AdSense meta tags added by Site Kit', 'google-site-kit' ) )
printf( "\n<!-- %s -->\n", esc_html__( 'Google Ads AMP snippet added by Site Kit', 'google-site-kit' ) )
printf( "\n<!-- %s -->\n", esc_html__( 'End Google Ads AMP snippet added by Site Kit', 'google-site-kit' ) )

printf( "\n<!-- %s -->\n", esc_html__( 'End Google Analytics AMP snippet added by Site Kit', 'google-site-kit' ) )

$wpdb->get_col(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT DISTINCT user_id
				FROM $wpdb->usermeta
				WHERE meta_key IN (%s, %s)
				LIMIT 100 -- Arbitrary limit to avoid unbounded user iteration.",
				$this->user_options->get_meta_key( Dismissed_Items::OPTION ),
				$this->user_options->get_meta_key( Dismissed_Prompts::OPTION ),
			)
		)
printf( "\n<!-- %s -->\n", esc_html__( 'Sign in with Google button added by Site Kit', 'google-site-kit' ) )
printf( "\n<!-- %s -->\n", esc_html__( 'End Sign in with Google button added by Site Kit', 'google-site-kit' ) )
printf( "\n<!-- %s -->\n", esc_html__( 'Google Tag Manager AMP snippet added by Site Kit', 'google-site-kit' ) )

printf(
			'<amp-analytics config="%s" data-credentials="include"%s><script type="application/json">%s</script></amp-analytics>',
			esc_url( 'https://www.googletagmanager.com/amp.json?id=' . rawurlencode( $this->tag_id ) ), // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
			$this->get_tag_blocked_on_consent_attribute(), // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.EscapeOutput.OutputNotEscaped
			wp_json_encode( $gtm_amp_opt )
		)
printf( "\n<!-- %s -->\n", esc_html__( 'End Google Tag Manager AMP snippet added by Site Kit', 'google-site-kit' ) )
printf( "\n<!-- %s -->\n", esc_html__( 'Google Tag Manager snippet added by Site Kit', 'google-site-kit' ) )

sanitizers.expression: esc_html( sprintf( __( 'Site Kit requires PHP version %s or higher', 'google-site-kit' ), GOOGLESITEKIT_PHP_MINIMUM ) )
esc_html( sprintf( __( 'Site Kit requires WordPress version %s or higher', 'google-site-kit' ), GOOGLESITEKIT_WP_MINIMUM ) )
$wpdb->prepare( "DELETE FROM $wpdb->usermeta WHERE user_id = %d AND meta_key LIKE %s", $user_id, $prefix )

wp_kses(
					$paragraph,
					array(
						'strong' => array(),
						'a'      => array(
							'class' => array(),
							'href'  => array(),
							'style' => array(),
						),
					)
				)
$wpdb->prepare( "DELETE FROM $wpdb->usermeta WHERE user_id = %d AND meta_key LIKE %s", $user_id, $prefix )

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT user_id FROM $wpdb->usermeta WHERE meta_key IN (%s, %s) LIMIT 20",
				$this->user_options->get_meta_key( Verification_File::OPTION ),
				$this->user_options->get_meta_key( Verification_Meta::OPTION )
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				/* phpcs:disable WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared */
				"
				DELETE FROM {$table_name}
				 WHERE {$column_name} LIKE %s
				    OR {$column_name} LIKE %s
				    OR {$column_name} LIKE %s
				    OR {$column_name} = %s
				", /* phpcs:enable WordPress.DB.PreparedSQL.InterpolatedNotPrepared */
				static::KEY_PATTERN,
				$transient_prefix . static::KEY_PATTERN,
				$transient_prefix . 'timeout_' . static::KEY_PATTERN,
				'googlesitekit-active-modules'
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT DISTINCT user_id
				FROM $wpdb->usermeta
				WHERE meta_key IN (%s, %s)
				LIMIT 100 -- Arbitrary limit to avoid unbounded user iteration.",
				$this->user_options->get_meta_key( Dismissed_Items::OPTION ),
				$this->user_options->get_meta_key( Dismissed_Prompts::OPTION ),
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT COUNT( user_id ) FROM $wpdb->usermeta WHERE meta_key = %s",
				$this->user_options->get_meta_key( Hashed_User_ID::OPTION )
			)
esc_html( sprintf( __( '%1$s (via %2$s)', 'google-site-kit' ), _x( 'Sign in with Google', 'Service name', 'google-site-kit' ), __( 'Site Kit by Google', 'google-site-kit' ) ) )
